https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E5%8D%B0%E5%B0%BC%E8%8F%AF%E4%BA%BA%E5%9C%8B%E7%B1%8D%E5%95%8F%E9%A1%8C#%E4%B8%AD%E8%8F%AF%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E5%85%B1%E5%92%8C%E5%9C%8B%E4%B8%8E%E5%8D%B0%E5%B0%BC%E7%9A%84%E9%9B%99%E9%87%8D%E5%9C%8B%E7%B1%8D%E5%8D%94%E5%AE%9A
印尼獨立後
中華人民共和國與印尼的雙重國籍協定

由於《中華民國國籍法》遺留的問題，令印尼華人在印尼獨立後，身份非常尷尬。當時中華人民共和國政府，為了爭取印尼的支持，在1955年萬隆會議後，於印尼萬隆簽署《中華人民共和國和印度尼西亞共和國關於雙重國籍問題的條約》，容許持有雙重國籍的華人，在條約簽署後20年內，成年時選擇印尼國籍或中國國籍[3]。由於中國當局的鼓勵，不少印尼華人的子女，都選擇了印尼國籍。

replies.msg:
我比本身我個個Guideline 你, 因為我D GRAMMAR一般
之後自己改CONTENT, 最好有一位巴打/絲打 英文係比較好

第1段話:自己係XX年出身世, 當時就好快樂咁,但而家因為97後支那點點點及而家國安法問題, 無法再係香港過一個安穩生活及隨時會對香港人做出不利行為 (例如捉晒人集中營, 會隨被捉上支那, 被殺等等)

第2段: 而家時勢, 希望想重開比97前申請, 因為部分當年係唔夠18歲, 未係一個合法成年人去申請, 因為冇得自行選擇 (如有更多理據去說服等會更好)

第3段:如果佢接納,建議分階段2批申請, 第1批係當年未年滿18歲, 第2批係當年已年滿18歲,理由係可以減少HMPO同時處理大量申請壓力, 使申請處理程序更快更暢順 (如有更好理由 順便講埋仲好)

第4段, 最後希望XXX再慎重及考慮接納我地意見, 因為時間無多

XXX
Hong Kong Citizen
Date: Day Month, Year

第4段, 最後希望XXX再慎重及考慮接納我地意見, 因為時間無多

XXX
Hong Kong Citizen
Date: Day Month, Year

replies.msg:
拋磚，我英文唔好同埋冇乜時間諗所以試下only 有問題請改


Dear Sir/Madam,

We are a group of youngsters from Hong Kong who born on or before 30/6/1997, the day before handover of Hong Kong from The United Kingdom to China. We have enjoyed our happiest childhood during the British Governance. Nevertheless, after the handover, we are now facing the greatest suppression from China in terms of human right and freedom caused by the the injustice legislation of Nation Security Law. In view of this, we write on behalf of all young Hong Kongers who born on or before 30/6/1997 to seek for your kind consideration on the re-opening of Application of British National (Overseas) (hereinafter “BNO”).

There are general criticisms from worldwide that Hong Kong will lose its specialty and turn into de-facto “One Country One System” after the Forced implementation of National Security Law by the Chinese Government. Referring to the Articles from the National Security Law, Hong Kongers can be arrested and send to China for jurisdiction if the Chinese Authorities believe that there is necessity to do so. Studying the Case of Simon CHENG Man-kit, a political refugee worked in the Consulate General of The United Kingdom in Hong Kong, who has granted asylum from the British Government, the Chinese government may easily arrest a Hong Konger for torture and unreasonable detention. Moreover, the are plenty of records that Chinese government suppress their citizens with different view from the Authority. Starting from 2016, there were reports from worldwide that Chinese government established the “Re-education Camp” in Xinjiang, which is in fact large concentration camps used to detain the Uyghur people with any “offences” claimed the Chinese Authorities. After the implementation of the National Security Law in Hong Kong, there are strong worries and fears that the Chinese government will suppress and largely arrest the protesters in Hong Kong who are fighting for freedom and democracy, which may form another humanity crisis.

We understand and appreciate that the British Government is planning to implement new immigration policy for BNO holders to work and live in The United Kingdom. However, due to different reasons our parents did not apply for BNO for us, a group of young people who born in the era of British-governing Hong Kong. Therefore, we are not able to hold BNO and we have lost our right to decide our citizenship and nationality by our freewill despite the fact that we are born in the territory of the United Kingdom.

In view of the aforementioned reasons, We, a group of young Hong Kongers who born on or before 30/6/1997, are asking for your kind consideration on the reopening of application of BNO. We understand that it may creat a great burden to HMPO, so you may kindly consider the two stage application for different age group if you kindly consider our suggestion.

Last but not least, we Hong Kongers are facing a great risk of unjustifiable arresting and extradition to China because of the National Security Law in Hong Kong. We shall be grateful if you would kindly consider and implement the reopening or any measure that can help us, to retrieve our British nationality Thank you.

Best Regards,
Peter Chan
Hong Kong Citizen

replies.msg:
唔知提及英國國籍法既不公義幫唔幫到你地，但我可以提供啲資料比你參考，慳番啲時間。

1948年後大英帝國得一種國籍cukc, 1962年英國單方面限制殖民地包括hk 自由進出英國既權利，1971定義咩cukc先有英國居留權，殖民地人要係英國本土留5年先有，1983將英國國籍分拆cukc成bc,bdtc等，1987年新增自願登記bno, 原本香港人bdtc 1997年失效。2002年其他海外屬地bdtc轉做新國籍botc兼可以申請bc. 但寫明香港排除在外。

英國人做既一切就係唔比香港人去英國。
當然呢家係求人地，但我覺得bdtc人士有責任了解自己國籍歷史同知道原來比英國改黎改去，以為老豆老母冇幫手登記bno係大錯，其實係英國設計出bno呢樣野先係原兇。
